classificationLegend.paper-backed: Directly supported by the paper or its authority snapshot.
classificationLegend.recovered-from-paper: Recovered from paper tables/figures/text but normalized into executable data.
classificationLegend.reproduction-assumption: Explicit assumption required to make the repo executable and reproducible.
classificationLegend.platform-visualization-only: Consumer/rendering convenience that must not be treated as training authority.
classificationLegend.artifact-derived: Computed from the exported checkpoint and run artifact rather than copied from source authority.

manifest.coordinateFrame.note: Consumer-facing rendering coordinate metadata; not a training authority input.

timeline.stepTrace.userPosition.localTan.note: Derived export convenience for frontend rendering; geodetic user positions remain the underlying truth.

timeline.stepTrace.rewardVector.source: checkpoint replay over the resolved config
timeline.stepTrace.rewardVector.note: Per-slot replay reward components derived from the exported checkpoint and environment semantics.

timeline.stepTrace.selectedServing.source: checkpoint replay over the resolved config
timeline.stepTrace.selectedServing.note: Serving-beam truth selected by the exported checkpoint during deterministic replay.

timeline.stepTrace.satelliteStates.source: checkpoint replay over the resolved config
timeline.stepTrace.satelliteStates.note: Per-slot satellite geometry derived from the replay timeline.

timeline.stepTrace.beamStates.source: checkpoint replay over the resolved config
timeline.stepTrace.beamStates.note: Per-slot beam geometry derived from the replay timeline.

evaluation.summary.training_summary.note: Aggregated training-run summary exported from the completed artifact.

evaluation.summary.best_eval_summary.note: Evaluation summary captured during checkpoint selection.
